items.title: Litton likely to return for second ODI in Zimbabwe
items.summary: Litton is expected to recover from his calf injury in time for the second and third ODIs in Zimbabwe and play "if he can meet all the parameters of our fitness test"
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: South Korea football coach quits as president calls for probe into World Cup loss
items.summary: South Korea was eliminated after missing out on a spot among the eight best third-placed teams.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: ‘Will I make it here again? This could be it’: Serena Williams on her Wimbledon return
items.summary: The seven-time Wimbledon singles champion who ‘evolved away’ from tennis shares why she’s back For two long weeks, since her return to the courts of a professional tennis tourna...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
